## Guardrail impact

- [ ] Preserves deterministic core behavior.
- [ ] Preserves source traceability and auditability.
- [ ] Does not add price targets.
- [ ] Does not add buy/sell/hold recommendations.
- [ ] Does not add personal investment advice.
- [ ] Does not add live fetching.
- [ ] Does not add framework-specific business logic to the deterministic core.
